Hi Daniel. I have a problem. I cannot access the new spreadsheet. Can you help me?
Of course. I can fix it for you. I am a little busy now, but I can call you in ten minutes.
Thank you. I do not want to struggle with it for hours.
No problem. By the way, our new colleague cannot open the folder either.
Can you support him today? He is new and he needs help.
Sure, I can support him this week. We can manage this.
Great. I am busy until noon, but I can call you after lunch.
Perfect. Do not worry -- we can figure out every problem together.

Hi team, this is Daniel. I have a quick message about the new spreadsheet. I know some of you cannot open the file yet. Do not worry. I can help. If you cannot access the folder, send me a message and I can fix it today. I can also support the new colleagues this week. Please do not struggle alone. I am a little busy in the morning, but I can call you in the afternoon. We can figure out every problem together. Thank you.

Hi Daniel, this is Fernanda. Thank you for your message. I can open the spreadsheet now, but I cannot find the supplier list. Can you help me with that? I do not want to struggle for hours. Also, our new colleague cannot access the shared folder. Can you support him today? I am busy until noon, but I can call you after lunch. I am sure we can manage this and figure it out together. Talk soon.
Can you help me with the report? I cannot open the file. I am a little busy now, but I can call you later. Do not struggle alone. I can fix it, and we can figure it out together.
